content.content:
content: "# Web Document

## Metadata

- title: e-Channel Services for Visitors\
  \ | Immigration Department
- url: https://www.immd.gov.hk/eng/services/echannel_visitors.html
\
  - source: Hong Kong Immigration Department
- domain: immd.gov.hk

## Content
\
  
### e-Channel Service for Frequent Visitors

#### Eligibility criteria

A\
  \ passenger is eligible to enrol for the Frequent Visitor e-Channel service when\
  \ all of the following conditions are met:

1. The passenger is aged 18 or above.
\
  2. The passenger holds a valid travel document and, where applicable, a valid multiple-visit\
  \ visa.
3. The passenger has no adverse record in the Hong Kong Special Administrative\
  \ Region.
4. The passenger also meets at least one frequent-visitor requirement.\
  \ This may be established by having entered Hong Kong through Hong Kong International\
  \ Airport at least twice during the 24 months immediately before enrolment, or by\
  \ holding a valid HKSAR Travel Pass, an APEC Business Travel Card bearing the code\
  \ “HKG”, or a valid membership card from a participating airline’\
  s frequent-flyer programme.

The Immigration Department may refuse an enrolment\
  \ application even when the listed eligibility conditions appear to be met.

\
  Under reciprocal automated-clearance arrangements, holders of passports from the\
  \ Republic of Korea, the Republic of Singapore, the Federal Republic of Germany,\
  \ Australia and the Kingdom of Thailand are required to enrol in order to use the\
  \ e-Channel service under the relevant arrangement. Country-specific requirements\
  \ may also apply.

#### Enrolment

Meeting the eligibility criteria allows a\
  \ passenger to enrol; it does not itself complete enrolment.

An eligible passenger\
  \ may enrol free of charge at an e-Channel Enrolment Office at Immigration Headquarters\
  \ or Hong Kong International Airport.

At Hong Kong International Airport, enrolment\
  \ offices are located in Terminal 1:

- Arrival North Hall, after the arrival\
  \ counters and before baggage reclaim: 10:00 a.m. to 6:00 p.m.
- Arrival South\
  \ Hall, after the arrival counters and before baggage reclaim: 7:30 a.m. to 11:00\
  \ p.m.

At enrolment, the passenger must present the valid travel document and\
  \ the supporting travel pass, APEC card, frequent-flyer membership card or multiple-visit\
  \ visa used for the application, as applicable.

Eligible visitors using an electronic\
  \ travel document sign an electronic consent form and have a photograph taken. Eligible\
  \ visitors using a non-electronic travel document sign an electronic consent form\
  \ and have both a photograph and fingerprints taken.

If enrolment information\
  \ changes, an enrolled passenger should update the information at an Enrolment Office\
  \ before continuing to use the service. Some enrolled visitors holding qualifying\
  \ electronic travel documents may update information through a self-service enrolment\
  \ kiosk at Hong Kong International Airport, subject to the conditions listed by\
  \ the Immigration Department.

#### Use of the e-Channel

An enrolled passenger\
  \ can use the e-Channel at Hong Kong control points.

For an electronic travel\
  \ document enrolled on or after 27 February 2026, the enrolled passenger places\
  \ the enrolled travel document on the document reader. After scanning, the passenger\
  \ enters the e-Channel, stands at the marked position and looks at the camera for\
  \ facial verification.

For a non-electronic travel document, or an electronic\
  \ travel document enrolled before 27 February 2026, the enrolled passenger places\
  \ the enrolled document on the reader and then uses the enrolled thumb or finger\
  \ for fingerprint verification.

The instructions for use repeatedly apply to\
  \ an enrolled passenger and the enrolled travel document. A passenger who only meets\
  \ the eligibility criteria but has not completed enrolment is not described as an\
  \ enrolled passenger for these steps.

#### Cancellation and enquiries

An enrolled\
  \ Frequent Visitor may apply to cancel the enrolment by completing the relevant\
  \ cancellation form and returning it in person to immigration staff at Immigration\
  \ Headquarters or a control point. Supporting documents must be produced for verification.\
  \ Cancellation is free of charge.

General enquiries may be sent to the Immigration\
  \ Department at enquiry@immd.gov.hk.
"
metadata: {}
title: e-Channel Services for Visitors | Immigration Department
url: https://www.immd.gov.hk/eng/services/echannel_visitors.html

Your eligibility is **confirmed**, but your **completed enrolment is not verified** in the available record. Therefore, I **can’t confirm that you can use the Frequent Visitor e-Channel for this departure**.

Hong Kong Immigration Department states that meeting the criteria does **not** complete enrolment—you must already be enrolled and use the enrolled travel document. If you have not completed enrolment, you cannot use the channel as an enrolled Frequent Visitor.

If needed, enrolment offices at Hong Kong International Airport are in **Terminal 1’s arrival halls**:

- Arrival North Hall: **10:00 a.m.–6:00 p.m.**
- Arrival South Hall: **7:30 a.m.–11:00 p.m.**

You’ll need your valid travel document and the supporting document used for eligibility. Official details: [Hong Kong Immigration Department – e-Channel Services for Visitors](https://www.immd.gov.hk/eng/services/echannel_visitors.html)

final_answer:
Your eligibility is **confirmed**, but your **completed enrolment is not verified** in the available record. Therefore, I **can’t confirm that you can use the Frequent Visitor e-Channel for this departure**.

Hong Kong Immigration Department states that meeting the criteria does **not** complete enrolment—you must already be enrolled and use the enrolled travel document. If you have not completed enrolment, you cannot use the channel as an enrolled Frequent Visitor.

If needed, enrolment offices at Hong Kong International Airport are in **Terminal 1’s arrival halls**:

- Arrival North Hall: **10:00 a.m.–6:00 p.m.**
- Arrival South Hall: **7:30 a.m.–11:00 p.m.**

You’ll need your valid travel document and the supporting document used for eligibility. Official details: [Hong Kong Immigration Department – e-Channel Services for Visitors](https://www.immd.gov.hk/eng/services/echannel_visitors.html)

question.regex:
(?isx)
^
(?=.{1,320}$)
(?!.*\b(?:
  passport
  | travel[\s_\-\u2010-\u2015]*document
  | identity[\s_\-\u2010-\u2015]*document
  | eligible[\s_\-\u2010-\u2015]*document
  | date[\s_\-\u2010-\u2015]*of[\s_\-\u2010-\u2015]*birth
  | nationality
  | residency
  | medical
  | diagnosis
  | disability
  | biometric
  | fingerprint
  | facial[\s_\-\u2010-\u2015]*(?:image|scan|recognition)
  | payment
  | card[\s_\-\u2010-\u2015]*number
  | (?:travel|flight|visit)[\s_\-\u2010-\u2015]*history
  | phone
  | email
  | address
  | enrol(?:ment)?[\s_\-\u2010-\u2015]*date
  | enroll(?:ment)?[\s_\-\u2010-\u2015]*date
  | approximate[\s_\-\u2010-\u2015]*date
  | approval[\s_\-\u2010-\u2015]*(?:code|reference|confirmation)
  | activation[\s_\-\u2010-\u2015]*(?:code|reference|confirmation)
  | confirmation[\s_\-\u2010-\u2015]*(?:email|code|reference)
  | reference[\s_\-\u2010-\u2015]*number
)\b)
(?!.*\b(?:
  instructions?
  | how[\s_\-\u2010-\u2015]*to
  | enrolment[\s_\-\u2010-\u2015]*(?:counter|office)
  | enrollment[\s_\-\u2010-\u2015]*(?:counter|office)
  | staffed[\s_\-\u2010-\u2015]*counter
)\b)
(?=.*\b(?:
  enrol(?:l?ed|l?ment)?
  | enroll(?:ed|ment)?
  | register(?:ed|ation)?
  | registration
  | activate(?:d|ion)?
)\b)
(?:
  (?=.*(?:
    frequent[\s_\-\u2010-\u2015]*visitor
    | e[\s_\-\u2010-\u2015]*channel
    | automated[\s_\-\u2010-\u2015]*clearance
  ))
  |
  (?=.*\b(?:this|that|the)[\s_\-\u2010-\u2015]*(?:service|channel|programme|program)\b)
  |
  (?=.*\b(?:already|previously|before|complete|completed|active)\b)
)
.*
$
